title: July 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 16''' is the 197th day (198th in leap years) of the year, with 168 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Richard LeParmentier]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Esther M. Friesner]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Stewart Copeland]] is born.
*[[1976]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] finishes.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 125|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 125]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 7: Far, Far Away]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part II)]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Maul — Son of Dathomir 3|''Star Wars: Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir'' 3]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 28|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' Part 28]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Alan Kupperberg]] dies.
*[[2017]] – "[[Ewok Escape]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2017]] – "[[The Padawan Path]]" airs on Disney Channel.
*[[2018]] – [[Madison Lloyd]] dies.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 2]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Who's Who in the Galaxy: Character Storybook]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Rescue on Ryloth (episode)|Rescue on Ryloth]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – "[[The Acolyte (episode)|The Acolyte]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Thrawn Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Ghost Agents 5|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents'' 5]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (2025) 3|''Star Wars'' (2025) 3]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 20|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 20]] published.
<noinclude>
